# CWE-515: shared status bit encodes secret across handlers (covert storage channel).
lang: go
file: CWE-515-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var quotaFlag int

func SetQuotaSecret(c *gin.Context) {
	if c.PostForm("over") == "1" {
		quotaFlag = 1
	} else {
		quotaFlag = 0
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}

func ProbeQuotaSecret(c *gin.Context) {
	if quotaFlag == 1 {
		c.String(http.StatusOK, "over_limit")
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, "ok")
}
